summary.zh: 用重叠淡入淡出切换等尺寸状态，减少视觉跳变。
summary.en: Crossfade overlapping, similarly sized states to reduce visual jumps.

definition.zh: 一个元素淡出的同时，另一个元素在同一位置淡入。
definition.en: Two overlapping states exchange opacity over the same interval, handing visual focus from one to the other.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 在同一位置切换尺寸接近的状态，减少内容瞬间替换造成的跳变。
purpose.en: Switch similarly sized states in the same location while reducing abrupt replacement.

frequency.zh: 适合中高频标签、图标和媒体状态；连续输入期间缩短重叠时间。
frequency.en: Use for medium- to high-frequency labels, icons, and media states; shorten overlap during continuous input.

trigger.zh: 由选中项、内容版本或媒体状态变化触发，两个状态共享布局槽位。
trigger.en: Trigger from selection, content version, or media-state changes, with both states sharing one layout slot.

enterExit.zh: 旧状态淡出与新状态淡入部分重叠；离开元素在不可见后移除。
enterExit.en: Partially overlap old-state fade-out and new-state fade-in, removing the old element after it is hidden.

interruptibility.zh: 快速切换时从当前混合比例继续，只保留最新目标。
interruptibility.en: On rapid changes, continue from the current blend ratio and retain only the latest target.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势；滑块驱动的对比应使用 Before / after slider。
gestureRules.en: No gesture is required; slider-driven comparison uses Before / after slider.

reducedMotion.zh: 缩短到 80–120ms，或直接替换并保留稳定尺寸。
reducedMotion.en: Shorten to 80–120ms or switch immediately while preserving stable dimensions.

reviewNotes.zh: 确保重叠文字不会被辅助技术重复朗读。
reviewNotes.en: Prevent overlapping text from being announced twice by assistive technology.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查两个状态的容器尺寸不会相互挤压。
reviewNotes.en: Keep both states from changing the shared container size.
